playbook.intent: Inbox-zero on bug tracker: Sentry / GitHub issues grouped, severity-tagged, top-3 fixed or queued, debt list updated with one decision per item (fix now / accept / kill).
playbook.scope: Inbox-zero on bug tracker: Sentry / GitHub issues grouped, severity-tagged, top-3 fixed or queued, debt list updated with one decision per item (fix now / accept / kill).

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pull the open list
stage.intent: Get every bug + debt item in one view.

tasks.task: Pull Sentry top-N issues by event count

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the list fits on one screen.

stage.name: Severity + cost tag
stage.intent: Rate each item by user pain and fix cost.

tasks.task: Estimate fix cost in tokens or hours of focus

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every item has all three tags.

stage.name: Top-3 fix or queue
stage.intent: Fix top-3 today OR queue them with a date.

tasks.task: Pick top-3 by severity x revenue
Queue the rest with a date and owner (always you)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each top-3 has a status: fixed / queued / accepted.

stage.name: Debt decision pass
stage.intent: One decision per debt item: fix now, accept, or kill.

tasks.task: Stamp each item: fix-now / accept / kill
Write a one-line rationale per kill

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no debt item is left in to-think-about.

stage.name: Update memories + signal
stage.intent: Stop the bug from coming back.

tasks.task: Add the worst pattern to mistake memory
Wire one new monitor/alert if the bug came from a blind spot
Close the ritual with a tracker snapshot

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when mistakes are written and snapshot is saved.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-tech-debt-triage-hour --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-tech-debt-triage-hour --format context, json: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-tech-debt-triage-hour --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
